perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a white t-shirt with 'MAY THE FORCE BE WITH YOU' text, a checkered flat cap, and glasses stands on a sidewalk next to parked scooters. He speaks enthusiastically to the camera, using hand gestures. (2) The video cuts to montage shots of a white Gogoro Pulse scooter parked in an outdoor riverside park with grass and a bridge. (3) The man presents the Polaroid MS106WG-S dash camera packaging and points out the camera lenses installed on the front and rear of the scooter. (4) Screen-recorded footage shows the dash cam's mobile application interface, demonstrating features like GPS tracking and video playback over maps. (5) Sample footage from the dash cam is shown, comparing daytime and nighttime recording quality in city traffic. (6) The man highlights other modifications on the scooter, such as the custom seat and handles. (7) The video concludes with final beauty shots of the scooter and a price overlay.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a female voice asking a question, followed by an energetic response from a male speaker as high-tempo, upbeat electronic background music starts. (2) The male speaker delivers a continuous, fast-paced narration about the scooter and the dash cam while the music maintains a constant rhythm. (3) Digital sound effects like 'dings' and 'whooshes' coincide with the appearance of text overlays. (4) During dash cam footage segments, ambient traffic noise and engine hums are briefly audible beneath the narration. (5) The music swells during the final price reveal and call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: '軟老闆 你最近晉升機車族耶' (Soft Boss, you've recently joined the scooter crowd) as an opening hook. (2) Functional Text: 'Polaroid MS106WG Series' identifying the main product. (3) Marketing Text: '專為Gogoro打造的戰備武器' (Combat equipment specially made for Gogoro) with high emotional emphasis. (4) Functional Text: '搭載Sony Starvis雙鏡頭', '前後1080P', 'Super HDR' listing technical specifications. (5) Decorative Text: '夜視星光等級的啦！' as an enthusiastic endorsement. (6) Functional Text: 'APP 全功能操控', 'OTA 軟體更新' describing software features. (7) Pricing Text: 'NT$7990元' showing the final cost.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Product Reveal -> Technical Feature Demonstration -> Pricing and CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator featured as the main speaker throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Adult male wearing glasses, a white t-shirt with Star Wars text, a black and white checkered flat cap, blue jeans, and several beaded bracelets.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts in an urban sidewalk setting with residential buildings and scooters; shifts to a scenic riverside park with green grass, a bicycle path, and a bridge in the distance.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Problem/Solution Context -> Feature List -> Technical Performance -> Pricing -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This is a promotional tech review for the Polaroid MS106WG-S dash camera, specifically targeting Gogoro scooter owners. It aims to demonstrate how the product integrates perfectly with the vehicle's design and warranty while providing high-quality 1080P HDR recording for safety and legal protection.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The presenter directly addresses the camera to showcase the product, lists specific technical benefits, and displays a final purchase price.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The 'Soft Boss' (軟老闆) persona and the consistent use of tech-focused graphic overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes high-quality b-roll of the scooter to enhance the premium feel of the endorsed electronic accessories.
